name: Nimbus Group AB (Publ)
summary: Nimbus Group AB (Publ) engages in the design, manufacture, and marketing of recreational motorboats in Sweden and the United States. The company, through a dealer network, offers its products under Alukin, Aquador, Bella, Falcon, Flipper, Nimbus, and Paragon Yachts brand names. Nimbus Group AB (Publ) was founded in 1968 and is based in Gothenburg, Sweden.
